title: chrysanthemum fastigiatum
intro: Chrysanthemum fastigiatum, also known as the narrow-leaved chrysanthemum or Chinese chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and skin problems. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum fastigiatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Chrysanthemum fastigiatum flowers are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
